# API Reference

Pydantic models discovered under `src/fsmrepairbench/`.

## `fsmrepairbench.artifact`

### `ArtifactManifest`

Module: `fsmrepairbench.artifact`

Top-level artifact manifest referenced by ``artifact.yaml``.

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `artifact_id` | `str` | yes | — |  |
| `title` | `str` | yes | — |  |
| `fsmrepairbench_version` | `str` | no | '0.1.0' |  |
| `dataset` | `str | Path | dict[str, Any]` | yes | — |  |
| `seeds` | `str | Path | dict[str, Any]` | yes | — |  |
| `models` | `str | Path | dict[str, Any]` | yes | — |  |
| `prompts` | `str | Path | dict[str, Any]` | yes | — |  |
| `experiment` | `str | Path | dict[str, Any]` | yes | — |  |
| `postprocess` | `fsmrepairbench.artifact.PostprocessArtifactSpec | None` | no | None |  |

### `DatasetArtifactSpec`

Module: `fsmrepairbench.artifact`

Dataset pinning for an artifact package.

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `benchmark_version` | `BenchmarkVersion` | yes | — |  |
| `size` | `int` | yes | — |  |
| `seed` | `int` | yes | — |  |
| `output_dir` | `Path` | yes | — |  |

| `cases_subdir` | `str` | no | 'cases' |  |

Module: `fsmrepairbench.artifact`

Experiment execution settings for an artifact package.

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `iterations` | `int` | no | 3 |  |
| `temperature` | `float` | no | 0.0 |  |

| `resume` | `bool` | no | True |  |

| `output_dir` | `Path` | yes | — |  |
